title: bidens reptans var. coreopsidis
intro: Bidens reptans var. coreopsidis, also known as Coreopsis bidens or Coreopsis, is a plant species within the Bidens genus, characterized by its dandelion-like appearance and edible roots. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been utilized to treat various health issues, including wounds, skin conditions, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Bidens reptans var. coreopsidis include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve drying and processing the roots to create teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
